turns.result: You step north into the shadows of the upper chamber.
turns.dm_action: Spawned Bat in room 3 (x=19,y=2). Player unaware.
turns.dm_narration: The torchlight catches something glistening on the ceiling far to the east — then it moves. Wings.

turns.result: You creep east, hand trailing the damp stone wall.
turns.dm_action: Placed a trip-wire trap at corridor x=9,y=3. Rat still at x=12,y=3.
turns.dm_narration: That door is iron-banded oak, swollen with moisture. Whatever waits beyond will hear it groan open.
